text: I feel a quiet excitement as I step inside this space. The glowing blue lights and glass walls invoke a sense of curiosity—like I am entering a realm of ideas and discoveries. The "R+D" wall speaks of innovation and coexistence, urging me to reflect on the interactions between humanity, technology, and nature. There is an energizing air of possibility here, and I feel both welcome and inspired to learn. My steps are deliberate, my mind attentive—a philosopher’s anticipation when encountering the new.
